overview: Professional marketing website for Bright Future Coaching Centre — an educational institute offering coaching for NEET, IIT-JEE, CEE, and Board (XI & XII) exams. Features individual course detail pages, an enquiry form with backend storage, and a bold deep blue + gold design.
features: Hero section with Admissions Open CTA
Individual course detail pages for NEET, IIT-JEE, CEE, and BOARD
About and contact page with address and phone numbers
Deep blue and gold color scheme
